notes: Speckit (specs/) remains the system of record for feature-level WHAT/HOW.
GSD provides the umbrella: PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md.
Per-phase plans should *reference* the corresponding specs/NNN-<slug>/plan.md instead of duplicating it.
Workflow agents (research/plan_check/verifier) disabled to avoid duplicating Speckit's own checklists/contracts.
Solo developer, no public timeline — auto-advance on, no parallelization needed.
